title: Vampyres
description: Vampire mod based on a alternative source for their origin and powers.
body:
A mod about vampires.

Adds vampires and hunters to the game. You can hunt the vampires or join them and get acess to their strengths, and weaknesses. This is a simple mod mostly focused on cosmetic Items with the intent to encourage the players customizability and story telling.

Main Features

-7 Vampyre armor variants(Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple, Magenta)

-1 Wood type(Jubokko Wood) that aids vampyres to colect blood

   * The blood colected is jubokko blood and is the base material for vampyre tools   and armor

-14 vampyre variants

-New Paintings that give hints about the mod

-2 New crops(Garlic and Holly Garlic)

  * Holly Garlic is the base material for hunter tools and armor

Made with MCreator
